relations.subject: Blue-cheeked amazon
relations.evidence: Logging in its habitat appears to be the current major threat with gold and other mining contributing. It is considered rare to uncommon in most of its range though common in the very small portion of it in Venezuela. ==References==<!-- BulletinOfTheBritishOrnithologistsClub127:118
